title: selaginella tetragonostachya
intro: Selaginella tetragonostachya, also known as Spike moss or Spike-leaved spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Selaginella tetragonostachya include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, making it a subject of interest in the field of traditional medicine. Selaginella tetragonostachya can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
